name: Dream Finders Homes, Inc.
business: We design, build and sell homes primarily in high-growth markets using our asset-light lot acquisition strategy. Our primary focus is on constructing and selling single-family homes across entry-level, first-time move-up, second-time move-up and active adult homes, as well as homes under built-for-rent contracts. To fully serve our homebuyers, we have financial services operations that offer mortgage banking solutions, title insurance services, and homeowners insurance.

exposures.sentence: We design, build and sell homes primarily in high-growth markets using our asset-light lot acquisition strategy.
Additionally, we offer homeowners insurance and adjacent products to homebuyers.

we have financial services operations that offer mortgage banking solutions primarily through our wholly owned mortgage banking business, Jet HomeLoans, LP, as well as title insurance services inclusive of agency services primarily through DF Title, LLC, doing business as Golden Dog Title & Trust and Golden Dog Title, and residential and commercial underwriting services through Alliant National Title Insurance Company, Inc.
